positive: A vibrant, whimsical scene of a stylized crescent moon cradling a small cluster of bioluminescent glowing mushrooms and delicate forest sprites. The overall style should be retro maximalism mixed with modern botanical illustration, featuring bold outlines, flat color gradients, and deep, saturated jewel tones (teal, magenta, emerald, sapphire). The composition should be perfectly centered and symmetrical, designed as a repeating pattern or standalone emblem for apparel. Focus on clean, distinct silhouettes and strong contrast between glowing elements and the dark, lush forest background. Intricate detail, perfect symmetry, high contrast, suitable for screen printing.
negative: photorealistic, photograph, blurry, noise, grain, bad anatomy, extra limbs, disfigured, watermark, signature, text, logos, low detail, artifacts, dirty, messy, muted colors
